form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 435m in 24.59 last start, beating Dr. Xanthic. Likes the rails so solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Hasn't threatened at her last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Forgive the latest run. Has solid claims on her best form.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 435m at this track. That followed a win two back in 22.84 beating Turtle Time over 400m at Warragul. Can't recommend against this lot.
